enumeration_data_types.name: sensor_low_cost_status
enumeration_data_types.description: Status that may have a low cost sensor

complex_data_types.name: sensor_calibration_algorithm
complex_data_types.description: Metadata that describes an algorithm or method used to transform raw measures of sensors to result air quality concentrations

fields.name: model_name
fields.description: Name of the model used for the calibration

fields.name: training_start
fields.description: Start of the period during which the model was trainned

fields.name: training_end
fields.description: End of the period during which the model was trainned

fields.name: regression_variables
fields.description: Names of variables used for the regression

fields.name: note
fields.description: Comments added to define additional semantics related to the calibration model

fields.name: python_library
fields.description: Name of the python library used to implement the model

fields.name: legal_station
fields.description: Identifier of the legal station that generated the input for the trainning

fields.name: info
fields.description: Additional information and parameters used to implement the calibratio method

complex_data_types.name: 2d_integer_vector
complex_data_types.description: Data type used to represent vectors with integer coordinates in a discrete 2d space.

complex_data_types.name: 2d_real_vector
complex_data_types.description: Data type used to represent vectors with real coordinates in a continuous 2d space.

feature_types.name: city
feature_types.description: City where traffic and air quality is monitored and predicted

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the city

properties.name: geo
properties.description: Geometry of the city

spatial_sampling_feature_types.name: aq_legal_station
spatial_sampling_feature_types.description: Air quality station compliant with ISO standards that enble the legal use of the measures.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the air quality station

properties.name: description
properties.description: description of the air quality station

spatial_sampling_feature_types.name: sensor_low_cost_feature
spatial_sampling_feature_types.description: Location defined to place low cost sensors to achive a sampling of the city.

properties.name: code
properties.description: Textual code assigned to the feature.

properties.name: note
properties.description: Comments that provide additional semantics about the feature location.

properties.name: location
properties.description: Textual description of the feature location.

references.name: legal_station
references.description: References the air quality legal station that which is in the same location

spatial_sampling_feature_types.name: air_quality_model_grid
spatial_sampling_feature_types.description: Grid used for the generation of air quality model outputs

properties.name: grid_origin
properties.description: Point that defines the bottom left corner of the grid.

properties.name: grid_res
properties.description: Vector of resolutions

properties.name: grid_size
properties.description: Vector of grid sizes in number of cells.

process_types.name: aq_legal_station_process
process_types.description: Process that generates air quality measures at the location of an aq_legal_station
process_types.title: Legal air quality measures obtained from air quality stations during the TRAFAIR project
process_types.abstract: This dataset records all the data obtained from air quality stations collected during the TRAFAIR project at the involved cities. The data was used to train machine learning models that generated air quality measures from low cost sensor raw data.
process_types.specific_usage: This dataset might be used as a ground truth for air quality measures at specific points.
process_types.use_limitation: This data may only be used for scientific purposes.

observed_properties.name: co
observed_properties.description: Concentration of co

observed_properties.name: no
observed_properties.description: Concentration of no

observed_properties.name: no2
observed_properties.description: Concentration of no2

observed_properties.name: o3
observed_properties.description: Concentration of o3

observed_properties.name: nox
observed_properties.description: Concentration of nox = no + no2

process_types.name: sensor_low_cost_process
process_types.description: Process that generates raw measures from electrochemical sensors installed in low cost devices.

properties.name: model
properties.description: Model of the low cost sensor device.

properties.name: trademark
properties.description: Trademark of the low cost sensor device.

properties.name: note
properties.description: Annotations recorded for a low cost sensor device

properties.name: sensor_box_code
properties.description: Code stamped in the device box

properties.name: status
properties.description: Status of the sensor in the period

properties.name: status_note
properties.description: Annotations that provide additional semantics related to the sensor status

properties.name: operator
properties.description: Name of the operator that updated the status of the sensor in the period.

process_types.title: Low cost sensor measures generated during the TRAFAIR project
process_types.abstract: This dataset records all the data obtained from air quality low cost sensors collected during the TRAFAIR project at the involved cities. The data was used to enhace the observation network of air quality.
process_types.specific_usage: This dataset might be used as estimations of air quality at specific points produced by a scientific work.
process_types.use_limitation: This data may only be used for scientific purposes.

observed_properties.name: battery_voltage
observed_properties.description: Voltage of the battery of the sensor.

observed_properties.name: humidity
observed_properties.description: humidity measured by the low cost sensor

observed_properties.name: temperature
observed_properties.description: Temperature measured by the low cost sensor

observed_properties.name: no_we
observed_properties.description: Current generated by the working electrode of no, which is exposed to the gases

observed_properties.name: no_aux
observed_properties.description: Current generated by the auxiliary electrode of no, which is not exposed to the gases

observed_properties.name: no2_we
observed_properties.description: Current generated by the working electrode of no2, which is exposed to the gases

observed_properties.name: no2_aux
observed_properties.description: Current generated by the auxiliary electrode no2, which is not exposed to the gases

observed_properties.name: ox_we
observed_properties.description: Current generated by the working electrode of ox, which is exposed to the gases

observed_properties.name: ox_aux
observed_properties.description: Current generated by the auxiliary electrode ox, which is not exposed to the gases

observed_properties.name: co_we
observed_properties.description: Current generated by the working electrode of co, which is exposed to the gases

observed_properties.name: co_aux
observed_properties.description: Current generated by the auxiliary electrode co, which is not exposed to the gases

observed_properties.name: co_concentration
observed_properties.description: Concentration of co estimated directly by the low cost sensor, applying the calibration defined by the manufacturer

observed_properties.name: no_concentration
observed_properties.description: Concentration of no estimated directly by the low cost sensor, applying the calibration defined by the manufacturer

observed_properties.name: no2_concentration
observed_properties.description: Concentration of no2 estimated directly by the low cost sensor, applying the calibration defined by the manufacturer

observed_properties.name: ox_concentration
observed_properties.description: Concentration of ox estimated directly by the low cost sensor, applying the calibration defined by the manufacturer. Oxidants (ox) use to match the concentration of ox=no2+o3

process_types.name: sensor_calibration_process
process_types.description: Process that transforms the outputs generated by the low cost sensor into gas concentrations, using regression.

properties.name: note
properties.description: Annotations that provide additional semantics to the calibration process.

properties.name: co_algorithm
properties.description: Metadata of the algorithm used to generate co measures.

properties.name: no_algorithm
properties.description: Metadata of the algorithm used to generate no measures.

properties.name: no2_algorithm
properties.description: Metadata of the algorithm used to generate no2 measures.

properties.name: o3_algorithm
properties.description: Metadata of the algorithm used to generate o3 measures.

references.name: sensor
references.description: References the low cost sensor whose data is used as input to the process.

process_types.title: Calibrated concentrations obtained by regression from low cost sensors, generated during the TRAFAIR project
process_types.abstract: This dataset records all the data calibrated using as input air quality low cost sensor measures collected during the TRAFAIR project at the involved cities. The data was used to enhace the observation network of air quality.
process_types.specific_usage: This dataset might be used as estimations of air quality at specific points produced by a scientific work.
process_types.use_limitation: This data may only be used for scientific purposes.

observed_properties.name: co
observed_properties.description: Concentration of co estimated applying the calibration method.

observed_properties.name: no
observed_properties.description: Concentration of no estimated applying the calibration method.

observed_properties.name: no2
observed_properties.description: Concentration of no2 estimated applying the calibration method.

observed_properties.name: o3
observed_properties.description: Concentration of o3 estimated applying the calibration method.

observed_properties.name: co_out_of_range
observed_properties.description: When this boolean flag has a tru value, the co concentration is out of range, according to a method applied to identify outlier.

observed_properties.name: no_out_of_range
observed_properties.description: When this boolean flag has a tru value, the no concentration is out of range, according to a method applied to identify outlier.

observed_properties.name: no2_out_of_range
observed_properties.description: When this boolean flag has a tru value, the no2 concentration is out of range, according to a method applied to identify outlier.

observed_properties.name: o3_out_of_range
observed_properties.description: When this boolean flag has a tru value, the co concentration is out of range, according to a method applied to identify outlier.

observed_properties.name: coverage
observed_properties.description: Percentage of the expected measures that have been collected in the input data during the period corresponding to the output resolution.

process_types.name: air_quality_model
process_types.description: Process that estimates the nox concentration at each point of the city (4 meters of spatial resolution) taking into account pollution emissions (mainly from traffic) and weather conditions (mainly wind). It uses the GRAL model (Graz Lagrangian Model), available at https://gral.tugraz.at/.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Textual description of the air quality model implementation.

process_types.title: Outputs of the air quality model generated during the TRAFAIR project
process_types.abstract: This dataset records all the outputs generated by the air quality model implemented for the TRAFAIR project.
process_types.specific_usage: This dataset might be used as estimations of air quality in the whole city produced by a scientific work.
process_types.use_limitation: This data may only be used for scientific purposes.

observed_properties.name: nox
observed_properties.description: Concentration of nox estimated by the model at each location. nox = no + no2.
